# Cedar Loop Market Style Guide Addendum

## Tone

The image should feel warm, walkable, local, fresh, and maker-friendly. It should invite neighbors into a daytime market, not a luxury boutique event or nightlife promotion.

## Color

Use market green, warm oat, and marigold as the primary system. Soft leaf green may support illustrations or path lines. Avoid neon fields and black-gold luxury palettes as active design choices.

## Typography

Use friendly sturdy serif or warm humanist sans-serif type. The brand name should be confident and readable. Avoid luxury fashion serif dominance, neon nightclub lettering, low-contrast scripts, and distressed novelty fonts.

## Visual language

Preferred imagery includes fresh stalls, local makers, produce, flowers, bread, ceramics, and short pedestrian path cues. Illustration can be lightly textured and hand-built, but it should not become childish or cluttered.

## Precedence

- campaign_brief.md is authoritative for required copy.
- visual_rules.json overrides this file and market_launch.pdf for machine-readable constraints.
- platform_specs.txt overrides template.yaml for size, margins, and safe areas.
- deprecated_assets.json overrides asset_manifest.json for asset eligibility.
